name: Sakura
description: A deeply characterful Japanese-aesthetic template featuring washi paper textures, Seigaiha wave patterns, Kamon crests, and falling cherry blossom petals. Ideal for converting written content into narrated, branded videos.

scene_defaults.title: The Season of Blossoms
scene_defaults.narration: A quiet meditation on the fleeting beauty of the cherry blossom.

sample_props.tagline: A quiet meditation on the fleeting beauty of spring

fields.label: Kanjititle
fields.description: Large main title in Japanese — a short (2–6 character) Japanese translation of the title / romanTitle. ALWAYS Japanese regardless of content language; never English letters.

fields.label: Romantitle
fields.description: English MEANING (translation) of the kanjiTitle, shown beneath the kanji — NOT its rōmaji reading (桜 → "Cherry Blossom", never "Sakura"). Stays in the content language.

fields.label: Tagline
fields.description: Short English tagline displayed below the brush stroke.

scene_defaults.title: The First Bloom
scene_defaults.narration: Each spring, the trees keep an unspoken appointment with the season.

sample_props.headline: The first bloom of the season
sample_props.body: For a few short days each spring, the trees keep an unspoken appointment with the season — petals opening all at once, then drifting free on the smallest breeze.

fields.label: Chapterkanji
fields.description: Short Japanese chapter label corresponding to chapterLabel (e.g. 第一章). ALWAYS Japanese regardless of content language.

fields.label: Chapterlabel
fields.description: English MEANING (translation) of chapterKanji shown beside the kanji eyebrow — NOT its rōmaji reading (第一章 → "Chapter One", never "Dai Isshō"). Stays in the content language.

fields.label: Headline
fields.description: Main section headline in large ink-colored type.

fields.label: Body
fields.description: Body paragraph text for this section.

scene_defaults.title: 物の哀れ
scene_defaults.narration: Mono no aware — a gentle sadness at the passing of things.

sample_props.quoteTranslation: A gentle sadness at the passing of things

fields.label: Quote
fields.description: The quote phrase in Japanese — same phrase as quoteTranslation, expressed in Japanese. ALWAYS Japanese regardless of content language.

fields.label: Quoteroman
fields.description: Rōmaji reading of quote, displayed in angle brackets below the vertical text. Must match the Japanese quote exactly.

fields.label: Quotetranslation
fields.description: English translation displayed in italic beneath the romanized reading. quote / quoteRoman / quoteTranslation are the same phrase in Japanese / Rōmaji / English and must stay consistent.

scene_defaults.title: Two Ways of Seeing
scene_defaults.narration: The bloom and the fall — two halves of a single, fleeting story.

sample_props.leftBody: In full flower the grove turns to cloud — soft, pink, and impossibly bright against the spring sky.
sample_props.rightBody: Days later the petals let go all at once, a slow snow that reminds us nothing beautiful is meant to last.

fields.label: Leftheadline
fields.description: Headline for the left column. MAX 2 WORDS — a tight label summarizing leftBody below it (e.g. 'The Bloom'). Never a phrase or sentence.

fields.label: Leftbody
fields.description: Body text for the left column.

fields.label: Rightheadline
fields.description: Headline for the right column. MAX 2 WORDS — a tight label summarizing rightBody. Never a phrase or sentence.

fields.label: Rightbody
fields.description: Body text for the right column (used when no image provided).

fields.label: Left Kanji
fields.description: EXACT Japanese translation of the left headline, shown vertically (tategaki) above it. Translate the headline itself into an authentic, concise Japanese word/phrase (~2–4 chars, 6 max; drop filler like Your/The) — not a loosely-related marker glyph. E.g. 'Your Website' → ウェブサイト, 'The Bloom' → 開花.

fields.label: Right Kanji
fields.description: EXACT Japanese translation of the right headline, shown vertically (tategaki) above it. Translate the headline itself into an authentic, concise Japanese word/phrase (~2–4 chars, 6 max; drop filler like Your/The) — not a loosely-related marker glyph. Never a bare kanji fragment (映 alone for 'video' → 映像). E.g. 'Your Video' → 映像, 'The Fall' → 落下.

scene_defaults.narration: Nearly all readers finished the piece — a rare feat for long-form writing.

sample_props.context: Nearly all readers finished the piece — a rare feat for long-form writing.

fields.label: Stat
fields.description: The large number or short metric string (e.g. "47%" or "1,200").

fields.label: Statlabel
fields.description: Short label beneath the stat (e.g. "Annual Growth").

fields.label: Context
fields.description: Supporting sentence providing context for the stat.

scene_defaults.title: Where to Watch the Blossoms
scene_defaults.narration: A handful of the most beloved places to greet the spring bloom.

sample_props.headline: Where to watch the blossoms
items: Ueno Park — lantern-lit avenues at dusk
Yoshino — thousands of trees across the hillside
Hirosaki Castle — petals drifting on the moat
The Philosopher's Path — a quiet canal walk

fields.label: Headline
fields.description: Section headline above the list.

fields.label: Items
fields.description: Array of list item strings (3–6 items recommended).

scene_defaults.title: A Brief Bloom
scene_defaults.narration: The blossom lasts barely a week — and that is exactly the point.

sample_props.headline: A brief bloom
sample_props.body: The cherry blossom lasts barely a week before it scatters. That brevity is not a flaw but the whole point — beauty made sharper by knowing it will soon be gone.

fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.description: Optional small label above the headline (leave empty to hide).

fields.label: Headline
fields.description: Main narration headline.

fields.label: Body
fields.description: Narration body paragraph.

scene_defaults.title: Hanami Journal
scene_defaults.narration: Follow along for more quiet stories of the season.

fields.label: Brandname
fields.description: Brand or publication name displayed as the large heading.

fields.label: Tagline
fields.description: Short brand tagline beneath the name.

fields.label: Ctatext
fields.description: Call-to-action text inside the bordered box.

fields.label: Websiteurl
fields.description: Website URL displayed at the bottom.

fields.label: Socialhandles
fields.description: Optional array of social handles shown in small type below the URL.

defaults.chartSummary: The blossom count rises through the season before it settles.
defaults.subtitle: Week

scene_defaults.title: The pattern in the numbers
scene_defaults.narration: The season turns, and the figures bloom with it.

fields.label: Chart data — col 1: X labels; cols 2–4: up to 3 numeric series (max 20 data rows). Use bar for named categories; histogram for bins/ranges (0–10, <5, 50+).
X-axis / category caption (overrides first column header)
Chart summary (short read beside the graphic)

scene_defaults.title: The data in view
scene_defaults.narration: Each entry set down like a pressed petal in the record.

fields.label: Table data — col 1: row labels; cols 2–6: numeric or text values. Max 20 rows, max 6 columns.
Highlight column index (0-based) for gain/loss coloring, e.g. 5 for the 6th column. Set to -1 to disable.
